SELECT
  DATE_FORMAT(dt, '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS `Peak Time`
FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`april_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`may_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`june_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`july_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`august_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_a2`
) AS a2_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  ROUND(
    (
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS PeakLoad
FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`april_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`may_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`june_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`july_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`august_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_a2`
) AS a2_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED) AS rn,
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    (
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
    ) / 1000 AS P_kW
  FROM `energy4`.`april_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`may_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`june_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`july_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`august_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_a2`
),
calc AS (
  SELECT
    ROUND(
      AVG(P_kW) OVER (
        ORDER BY rn
        ROWS BETWEEN CURRENT ROW AND 2 FOLLOWING
      ),
      2
    ) AS Peak15_kW,
    dt
  FROM base
  WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
)
SELECT Peak15_kW AS `Peak15 kW`
FROM calc
ORDER BY Peak15_kW DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  NOW() AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(v_num), 2) AS V_L1_avg
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS v_num
  FROM `energy4`.`april_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`may_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`june_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`july_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`august_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`sep_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`oct_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`nov_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`dec_a2`
) t
WHERE $__timeFilter(dt)

SELECT

FROM (

         CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))

  FROM `energy4`.`sep_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))

  FROM `energy4`.`dec_a2`

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      (CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
       CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / 1000
    ),
    2
  ) AS `S_L1_avg`
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt, v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`april_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`may_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`june_a2`

  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l3, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`dec_a2`
) AS a2_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) / 1000
    ),
    2
  ) AS `P_L3_avg`
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`april_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`may_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`june_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`july_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`august_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`sep_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`oct_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`nov_a2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`dec_a2`
) AS a2_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(AVG((v_num * a_num) / 1000), 2) -
        POW(AVG(w_num / 1000), 2),
        0
      )
    ),
    2
  ) AS Q_L3_avg
FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS v_num,
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS a_num,
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS w_num
  FROM `energy4`.`april_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`may_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`june_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`july_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`august_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_a2`
) AS a2_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    AVG(w_num) / NULLIF(AVG(v_num * a_num), 0),
    3
  ) AS PF_L3_avg
FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS v_num,
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS a_num,
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS w_num
  FROM `energy4`.`april_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`may_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`june_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`july_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`august_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_a2`
) AS a2_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time,
  ROUND(
    (
      (CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
       CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) +
      (CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
       CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) +
      (CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
       CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)))
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS S_kVA
FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    v_l1, v_l2, v_l3,
    a_l1, a_l2, a_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`april_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`may_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`june_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`july_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`august_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`sep_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`oct_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`nov_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`dec_a2`
) AS a2_all
WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
  AND dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY dt;

  ROUND(
    (CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
     CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS S_L1,

  ROUND(
    (CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
     CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS S_L2,

  ROUND(
    (CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
     CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / 1000,

) AS a2_all

ORDER BY dt;

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`july_a2`

  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`august_a2`

panels.title: กราฟกำลังไฟฟ้าเสมือนรวมของตึกตามช่วงเวลา

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time,

  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
          CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ) -
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ),
        0
      )
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS Q_L1,

  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
          CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ) -
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ),
        0
      )
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS Q_L2,

  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
          CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ) -
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ),
        0
      )
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS Q_L3

FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    v_l1, v_l2, v_l3,
    a_l1, a_l2, a_l3,
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`april_a2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`may_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`june_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`july_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`august_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`sep_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`oct_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`nov_a2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`dec_a2`
) AS a2_all
WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
  AND dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY dt;

SELECT

FROM (

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`may_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`june_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),

  UNION ALL

    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),

  FROM `energy4`.`sep_d`

  UNION ALL

  UNION ALL

SELECT
  ROUND(
    (
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))

  ) AS PeakLoad
FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`april_d`

  UNION ALL

    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),

  FROM `energy4`.`may_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`june_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`july_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`august_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),

ORDER BY
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED) AS rn,
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    (
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
    ) / 1000 AS P_kW
  FROM `energy4`.`april_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`may_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`june_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`july_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`august_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_d`
),
calc AS (
  SELECT
    ROUND(
      AVG(P_kW) OVER (
        ORDER BY rn
        ROWS BETWEEN CURRENT ROW AND 2 FOLLOWING
      ),
      2
    ) AS Peak15_kW,
    dt
  FROM base
  WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
)
SELECT Peak15_kW AS `Peak15 kW`
FROM calc
ORDER BY Peak15_kW DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(AVG(v_num), 2) AS V_L1_avg
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`april_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`may_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`june_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`july_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`august_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`sep_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`oct_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`nov_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) FROM `energy4`.`dec_d`
) t(dt, v_num)
WHERE $__timeFilter(dt)

         CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      (CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
       CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / 1000
    ),
    2
  ) AS `S_L1_avg`
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt, v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`april_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`may_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`june_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`july_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`august_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`sep_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`oct_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`nov_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`dec_d`
) AS d_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) / 1000
    ),
    2
  ) AS `P_L1_avg`
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt, w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`april_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`may_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`june_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`july_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`august_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`sep_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`oct_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`nov_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`dec_d`
) AS d_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(AVG((v_num * a_num) / 1000), 2) -
        POW(AVG(w_num / 1000), 2),
        0
      )
    ),
    2
  ) AS Q_L1_avg
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS v_num,
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS a_num,
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS w_num
  FROM `energy4`.`april_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`may_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))

                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))

                   CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))

  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l2 FROM `energy4`.`oct_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l2 FROM `energy4`.`nov_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l2 FROM `energy4`.`dec_d`
) AS d_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(AVG((v_num * a_num) / 1000), 2) -
        POW(AVG(w_num / 1000), 2),
        0
      )
    ),
    2
  ) AS Q_L2_avg
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS v_num,
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS a_num,
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS w_num
  FROM `energy4`.`april_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),

                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))

  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),

WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

FROM (

SELECT

  FROM `energy4`.`july_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`august_d`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,

    3

FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS v_num,
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS a_num,
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS w_num
  FROM `energy4`.`april_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`may_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`june_d`

  UNION ALL

  UNION ALL

  FROM `energy4`.`oct_d`

  UNION ALL

  FROM `energy4`.`nov_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),

  FROM `energy4`.`dec_d`
) AS d_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time,
  ROUND(
    (
      (CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
       CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) +
      (CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
       CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) +
      (CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
       CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)))
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS S_kVA
FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    v_l1, v_l2, v_l3,
    a_l1, a_l2, a_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`april_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`may_d`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`june_d`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`july_d`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`august_d`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`sep_d`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`oct_d`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`nov_d`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`dec_d`
) AS d_all
WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
  AND dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY dt;

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time,

  ROUND(
    (CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
     CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS S_L1,

  ROUND(
    (CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
     CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS S_L2,

  ROUND(
    (CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
     CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS S_L3

FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    v_l1, v_l2, v_l3,
    a_l1, a_l2, a_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`april_d`

  UNION ALL

panels.title: กราฟกำลังไฟฟ้าแต่ละเฟสของตึกตามช่วงเวลา

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time,
  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(
          (
            (CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
             CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) +
            (CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
             CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) +
            (CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
             CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)))
          ),
          2
        ) -
        POW(
          (
            CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
            CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
            CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
          ),
          2
        ),
        0
      )
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS Q_kVAr
FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    v_l1, v_l2, v_l3,
    a_l1, a_l2, a_l3,
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`april_d`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`may_d`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`june_d`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`july_d`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`august_d`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`sep_d`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`oct_d`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`nov_d`
  UNION ALL

panels.title: กราฟกำลังไฟฟ้าเสมือนรวมของตึกตามช่วงเวลา

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time,

  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
          CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ) -
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ),
        0
      )
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS Q_L1,

  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
          CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ) -
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ),
        0
      )
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS Q_L2,

  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
          CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ) -
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ),
        0
      )
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS Q_L3

FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    v_l1, v_l2, v_l3,
    a_l1, a_l2, a_l3,

  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_f`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_f`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_f`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_f`
) AS f_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED) AS rn,
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    (
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
    ) / 1000 AS P_kW
  FROM `energy4`.`april_f`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`may_f`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`june_f`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`july_f`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`august_f`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_f`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_f`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_f`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_f`
),
calc AS (
  SELECT
    ROUND(
      AVG(P_kW) OVER (
        ORDER BY rn
        ROWS BETWEEN CURRENT ROW AND 2 FOLLOWING
      ),
      2
    ) AS Peak15_kW,
    dt
  FROM base
  WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
)
SELECT Peak15_kW AS `Peak15 kW`
FROM calc
ORDER BY Peak15_kW DESC
LIMIT 1;

  UNION ALL

  UNION ALL

  UNION ALL

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      (CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
       CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / 1000
    ),
    2
  ) AS `S_L1_avg`
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt, v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`april_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`may_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`june_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`july_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`august_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`sep_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`oct_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`nov_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, a_l1 FROM `energy4`.`dec_f`
) AS f_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) / 1000
    ),
    2
  ) AS `P_L1_avg`
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt, w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`april_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`may_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`june_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`july_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`august_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`sep_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`oct_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`nov_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l1 FROM `energy4`.`dec_f`
) AS f_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(AVG((v_num * a_num) / 1000), 2) -
        POW(AVG(w_num / 1000), 2),
        0
      )
    ),
    2
  ) AS Q_L1_avg
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS v_num,
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS a_num,
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS w_num
  FROM `energy4`.`april_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`may_f`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time,
  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(
          (
            (CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
             CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) +
            (CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
             CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) +
            (CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
             CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)))
          ),
          2
        ) -
        POW(
          (
            CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
            CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
            CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))

    2
  ) AS Q_kVAr

  SELECT

) AS f_all
WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
  AND dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY dt;

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_FORMAT(dt, '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS `Peak Time`
FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`april_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`may_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`june_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`july_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`august_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_f2`
) AS f2_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  ROUND(
    (
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS PeakLoad
FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`april_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),

  FROM `energy4`.`may_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`june_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`july_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`august_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),

) AS f2_all

ORDER BY
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
  CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED) AS rn,
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    (
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
    ) / 1000 AS P_kW
  FROM `energy4`.`april_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`may_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`june_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`july_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`august_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_f2`
),

calc AS (
  SELECT
    ROUND(
      AVG(P_kW) OVER (
        ORDER BY rn
        ROWS BETWEEN CURRENT ROW AND 2 FOLLOWING
      ),
      2
    ) AS Peak15_kW,
    dt
  FROM base
  WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
)

SELECT Peak15_kW AS `Peak15 kW`
FROM calc
ORDER BY Peak15_kW DESC
LIMIT 1;

    CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS a_num,
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS w_num
  FROM `energy4`.`april_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`may_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`june_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`july_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`august_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_f2`
) AS f2_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      (
        CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
        CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
      ) / 1000
    ),
    2
  ) AS `S_L3_avg`
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt, v_l3, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`april_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l3, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`may_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l3, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`june_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l3, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`july_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l3, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`august_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l3, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`sep_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l3, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`oct_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l3, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`nov_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l3, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`dec_f2`
) AS f2_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    AVG(
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) / 1000
    ),
    2
  ) AS `P_L3_avg`
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`april_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`may_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`june_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`july_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`august_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`sep_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`oct_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`nov_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`dec_f2`
) AS f2_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(AVG((v_num * a_num) / 1000), 2) -
        POW(AVG(w_num / 1000), 2),
        0
      )
    ),
    2
  ) AS Q_L3_avg
FROM (
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
         CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS v_num,
         CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS a_num,
         CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS w_num
  FROM `energy4`.`april_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`may_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`june_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`july_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`august_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_f2`
  UNION ALL SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
                   CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
                   CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_f2`
) AS f2_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  $__timeFrom() AS time,
  ROUND(
    AVG(w_num) / NULLIF(AVG(v_num * a_num), 0),
    3
  ) AS PF_L3_avg
FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS v_num,
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS a_num,
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS w_num
  FROM `energy4`.`april_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`may_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`june_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`july_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`august_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`sep_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`oct_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
    CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_f2`
) AS f2_all
WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time,
  ROUND(
    (
      (CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
       CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) +
      (CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
       CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) +
      (CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
       CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)))
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS S_kVA
FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    v_l1, v_l2, v_l3,
    a_l1, a_l2, a_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`april_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`may_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`june_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`july_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`august_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`sep_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`oct_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`nov_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`dec_f2`
) AS f2_all
WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
  AND dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY dt;

panels.title: กราฟกำลังไฟฟ้าปรากฏรวมของตึกตามช่วงเวลา

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time,

  ROUND(
    (CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
     CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS S_L1,

  ROUND(
    (CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
     CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS S_L2,

  ROUND(
    (CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
     CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS S_L3

FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    v_l1, v_l2, v_l3,
    a_l1, a_l2, a_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`april_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`may_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`june_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`july_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`august_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`sep_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`oct_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`nov_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3 FROM `energy4`.`dec_f2`
) AS f2_all

WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
  AND dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

ORDER BY dt;

panels.title: กราฟกำลังไฟฟ้ารวมของตึกตามช่วงเวลา

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time,

  ROUND(
    CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) / 1000,
    2

  UNION ALL

panels.title: กราฟกำลังไฟฟ้าแต่ละเฟสของตึกตามช่วงเวลา

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time,
  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(
          (
            (CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
             CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) +
            (CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
             CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) +
            (CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
             CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)))
          ),
          2
        ) -
        POW(
          (
            CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
            CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
            CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
          ),
          2
        ),
        0
      )
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS Q_kVAr
FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    v_l1, v_l2, v_l3,
    a_l1, a_l2, a_l3,
    w_l1, w_l2, w_l3
  FROM `energy4`.`april_f2`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`may_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`june_f2`
  UNION ALL

  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`august_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`sep_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`oct_f2`
  UNION ALL
  SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'), v_l1, v_l2, v_l3, a_l1, a_l2, a_l3, w_l1, w_l2, w_l3 FROM `energy4`.`nov_f2`
  UNION ALL

panels.title: กราฟกำลังไฟฟ้าเสมือนรวมของตึกตามช่วงเวลา

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time,

  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(v_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
          CAST(REPLACE(a_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ) -
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ),
        0
      )
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS Q_L1,

  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(v_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
          CAST(REPLACE(a_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ) -
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ),
        0
      )
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS Q_L2,

  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      GREATEST(
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(v_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) *
          CAST(REPLACE(a_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2
        ) -
        POW(
          CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)),
          2

        0
      )
    ) / 1000,
    2
  ) AS Q_L3

FROM (
  SELECT
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED) AS rn,
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s') AS dt,
    (
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
      CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
    ) / 1000 AS P_kW
  FROM `energy4`.`april_k`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),

           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))

         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`nov_k`

  UNION ALL
  SELECT CAST(`Number` AS UNSIGNED),
         STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(`date`, ' ', `time`), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%s'),
         (
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l1, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l2, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) +
           CAST(REPLACE(w_l3, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))
         ) / 1000
  FROM `energy4`.`dec_k`
),
calc AS (
  SELECT
    ROUND(
      AVG(P_kW) OVER (
        ORDER BY rn
        ROWS BETWEEN CURRENT ROW AND 2 FOLLOWING
      ),
      2
    ) AS Peak15_kW,
    dt
  FROM base
  WHERE dt BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
)
SELECT Peak15_kW AS `Peak15 kW`
FROM calc
ORDER BY Peak15_kW DESC
LIMIT 1;
